whatthekoi:

whenever i interact w older mutuals i imagine them being like damn not this kid again fml And then they drink like seven beers

@sapphic-dice

Pffff.

I don’t even drink alcohol lol.

“older mutuals” yall she’s 23…

Yeah, I’m not that old lol.

I’m still in college.

~waves quietly from the corner~ Granted,
reblog_comment: ~waves quietly from the corner~ Granted, there’s no “not this kid again”, plus since I redid puberty, that means I’m in my 20s again now, right?

trail.content_raw: ~waves quietly from the corner~ Granted, there’s no “not this kid again”, plus since I redid puberty, that means I’m in my 20s again now, right?
